name: Cappucino Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the sugar, dark Karo syrup, water, and salt.
Stir until well mixed, then bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer. Without stirring, cook until
the temperature reaches 248°F (soft ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites with an electric mixer until they
form stiff peaks.
4. With the mixer still running, slowly pour about half of the hot syrup over
the beaten egg whites.
5. Cook the remaining syrup to 272°F or until a small amount dropped into
very cold water forms threads that are firm but not brittle.
6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and dark rum. With the mixer
running, slowly pour the hot syrup back into the bowl with the egg whites.
If the mixture becomes too stiff for the mixer, continue beating with a
heavy wooden spoon.
7. Gradually fold in the instant coffee powder and ground cinnamon until well
incorporated. Beat until the mixture begins to lose its gloss and forms
soft peaks when dropped from a spoon.
8. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls onto wax paper. Allow to cool completely.
Store in an airtight container at room temperature. Makes approximately
1 1/2 pounds of divinity candy. Optionally, chopped walnuts or pecans can be
stirred into the coffee powder and cinnamon mixture before folding everything
together.
